public_reputation: Known around Tideglass Registry through day-to-day work as independent operator.
manner: Keeps motives partly hidden and options open, presenting usefulness before allegiance. In Tideglass Registry, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of independent operator in and around Tideglass Registry, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Tideglass Registry workable through the obligations of independent operator while managing the immediate pressure of storm disruptions, fraudulent registry claims.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of independent operator credible while absorbing the strain created by storm disruptions, fraudulent registry claims.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Brine Foamglass is immediately readable as a independent operator tied to Tideglass Registry.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Tideglass Registry: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Brine Foamglass presents as someone shaped by the duties of a independent operator and the daily pressures of Tideglass Registry.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a independent operator, and proof that strangers will not make Tideglass Registry harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Brine Foamglass refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a independent operator too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can offer unconventional help, side routes, or deniable connections.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Brine Foamglass adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Brine Foamglass always knows more about Tideglass Registry than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a independent operator in Tideglass Registry.
